subject: [RFC PATCH v4 03/27] mm/page_alloc: add numa_zone_allowed() and wire it up

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Introduced a new helper function numa_zone_allowed() to consolidate and simplify zone filtering in the mm/page_alloc code. The function checks cpuset membership when cpusets are enabled and gates N_MEMORY_PRIVATE zones behind __GFP_PRIVATE globally.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series aims to consolidate and simplify zone filtering in the mm/page_alloc code by introducing a new helper function, numa_zone_allowed(). The current implementation uses open-coded patterns that don't account for N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes on systems without cpusets. The new function checks cpuset membership when cpusets are enabled and gates N_MEMORY_PRIVATE zones behind __GFP_PRIVATE globally.
